data.name: Libertine: King of Hearts
data.detailed_description:
WELCOME TO LIBERTINE

Libertine: King of Hearts is an immersive sim/dating sim following the story of Richard as he accidentally gets pulled into a gang war between Libertine's rival gangs. After a job gone wrong, Richard finds himself fighting for his life while scrambling to find the secret hidden beneath the city.

YOUR MIND IS YOUR WEAPON

Sneak, shoot and combine various gadgets to engage with your enemies. Use physics objects in each level to trip, knock out or distract your opponents. Throw your spy cam to tag enemies, destroy lights to make it easier to sneak, or build yourself cover with your environment.

BE THE KING OF HEARTS

Try your luck romancing 5 different characters each with their own unique questline intertwined with the main quest. Some just want to have fun, but others are trying to come to terms with their dark past. Each character has explicit romance scenes for the player to discover, but if you’d rather play the game without the adult content, all adult scenes can be set to fade to black and all nudity can be censored.

data.short_description: Libertine: King of Hearts is an immersive sim/dating sim following a man as he gets pulled into the seedy underworld of Libertine. Sneak, shoot, and combine physics with gadgets to defeat enemies in your own unique way. Made by a solo dev with a dream to create the best adult game ever made.
data.supported_languages:
英文*
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 10, Windows 11
  • 處理器: Intel® Core™ i3-10105F
  • 記憶體: 16 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: GTX 1660
  • 儲存空間: 25 GB 可用空間
  • 備註: Medium Settings @ 40 FPS 1080P
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 10, Windows 11
  • 處理器: Intel® Core™ i5-12600KF
  • 記憶體: 32 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: RTX 3060
  • 儲存空間: 25 GB 可用空間
  • 備註: High Settings @ 60 FPS 1080P

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • OS: Windows 10, Windows 11
  • Processor: Intel® Core™ i3-10105F
  • Memory: 16 GB RAM
  • Graphics: GTX 1660
  • Storage: 25 GB available space
  • Additional Notes: Medium Settings @ 40 FPS 1080P
pc_requirements.recommended:
Recommended:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • OS: Windows 10, Windows 11
  • Processor: Intel® Core™ i5-12600KF
  • Memory: 32 GB RAM
  • Graphics: RTX 3060
  • Storage: 25 GB available space
  • Additional Notes: High Settings @ 60 FPS 1080P
